error_signature: API does not recognize variable in JSON call
title: OpenAI API fails to recognize variable in JSON request
symptom: When attempting to use a variable in a JSON API call, the API does not recognize the variable, leading to errors. Using a direct link works, but the variable is needed for dynamic content.
applies_when: Trying to include a variable in a JSON request
not_this_if: Using a direct link instead of a variable
root_cause: The issue arises because the variable must be selected from the explorer rather than manually typed. When typed, the API does not interpret it correctly, leading to recognition failures.
fix_steps: Open the variable explorer in the WeWeb interface
Click on the desired variable instead of typing it manually
Ensure the variable appears in blue in the formula builder
Complete the JSON request and test the API call
agent_instruction: Select the variable directly from the explorer to ensure it is recognized in the JSON call.
